trans-unit.source: This update includes minor bug fixes, UI adjustments and other performance improvements.
trans-unit.target: Denne opdatering indeholder mindre fejlrettelser, justeringer af brugerfladen og andre forbedringer af ydelsen.
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block

trans-unit.source: Thank you for installing the latest version!
trans-unit.target: Tak for at du har installeret den seneste version.
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block

trans-unit.source: You’re using the latest version of Mozilla VPN.
trans-unit.target: Du bruger den seneste version af Mozilla VPN.
Du har opdateret til Mozilla VPN 2.19
